HL7Messages.Message: MSH|^~\&|PATHL7|EXC-RV^LIFELABS ONTARIO|HTTPCLIENT|testusr1|20131125150111-0800||ORU^R01|XYZ20131125150111099|D|2.3.1|||AL PID|||||TESTING^ORGANISMS^^^^^L||19850301|M|||||^H PV1|1|OU ORC|RE||2013-1M2560050|2013-1M2560050 OBR|1|2013-1M2560050-2_TR11976-8|2013-1M2560050-2_TR11976-8|TR11976-8^Urine Culture|||20130913120100|||||||20130913120200||00000^MICRO PROFICIENCY^Provider Unavailable||||||||MICRO3|F|||13131301^QA^LIFELABS~00000^MICRO PROFICIENCY^Provider Unavailable OBX|1|ST|31208-2^Specimen Source||MIDSTREAM URINE||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|2|ST|33882-2^Collection Date||13-SEP-2013||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|3|ST|49049-0^Collection Time||12:01||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|4|FT|19090-0^Colony Count||>100 x E6 CFU/L||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|5|ST|CUL STAT^Culture Status||Final||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|6|FT|634-6^Culture Report||Urine Culture||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|7|CE|6463-4^Organism|1|Escherichia coli||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 OBX|8|CE|6463-4^Organism|2|Enterobacter cloacae||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 NTE|||Cephalothin interpretative criteria may be used\.br\to predict results to Keflex (Cephalexin).\.br\Resistance may develop during prolonged therapy\.br\with 3rd generation cephalosporins. Testing of\.br\repeat isolates may be required. OBX|9|CE|6463-4^Organism|3|Staphylococcus aureus||||||F|||20130916100052-0400 NTE|||Primary Staphylococcus aureus urinary tract\.br\infections are uncommon. Please submit a repeat\.br\specimen and blood cultures if clinically\.br\indicated.
